mapper.update: INSERT INTO rule_config ( id, tenant, app, api, `type`, `limit`, `window`, `enable` ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenant}, #{app}, #{api}, #{type}, #{limit}, #{window}, #{enable} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `type` = VALUES(`type`), `limit` = VALUES(`limit`), `window` = VALUES(`window`), `enable` = VALUES(`enable`), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
